title: ITR Filing AY 2026-27: Key Updates from Income Tax Department FAQs
content:
# ITR Filing AY 2026-27: Key Updates from Income Tax Department FAQs

Ek important update hai taxpayers aur professionals ke liye! Income Tax Department ne `incometax.gov.in` par updated FAQs publish kiye hain, jismein Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke liye Income Tax Return (ITR) filing ke kuch crucial aspects ko clarify kiya gaya hai.

Yeh updates bahut important hain, especially during this transitional period.

*   **Applicable Law:** FAQs clearly state karte hain ki Financial Year (FY) 2025-26 (jo ki Assessment Year 2026-27 banta hai) ki income ke liye ITR, **Income Tax Act, 1961** ke provisions ke under hi file kiya jayega. Naya Income Tax Act, 2025, Tax Year 2026-27 (FY 2026-27 ki income) par hi apply hoga, jiske returns July 2027 mein due honge.
*   **ITR-4 (Sugam) Due Date:** "File ITR-4 (Sugam) Online FAQs" ke according, AY 2026-27 (FY 2025-26) ke liye ITR-4 file karne ki due date **August 31, 2026** hai.
*   **ITR-4 Form Mein Changes:** AY 2026-27 ke ITR-4 form mein kuch significant changes bhi highlight kiye gaye hain:
    *   Ab taxpayers do house properties tak ki income report kar sakte hain.
    *   "Rent which cannot be realised" ke liye ek naya, specific field introduce kiya gaya hai.

Yeh clarifications taxpayers ko sahi Act aur form ke under time par compliance karne mein help karenge.
